title: Missile kit lets fighter jets down drones on the cheap
description: Shooting down a drone with a fighter jet is as cost effective as wrapping sandwiches in gold foil, but BAE Systems has cut the price by firing an economy anti-drone Advanced Precision Kill Weapon System (APKWS) missile from a Typhoon Eurofighter.Continue Read…

de: Mit dem Raketenbausatz können Kampfjets Drohnen kostengünstig abschießen.
